headline: Shawn Levy's 21 Laps Rockets Ambitious Sci-Fi Epic to Netflix
lede: Director-producer Shawn Levy is expanding his streaming sci-fi portfolio with another high-concept original project set to land at Netflix.
body:
Netflix is doubling down on original science fiction with a provocative new spec script from rising writer Max Taxe, set to be produced by Shawn Levy's prolific 21 Laps Entertainment.

The project, currently titled 'Somewhere Out There', represents another bold genre swing for Levy, who has become a go-to filmmaker for high-concept science fiction and adventure storytelling. His track record with Netflix — including the massively successful 'Stranger Things' and recent Ryan Reynolds vehicle 'The Adam Project' — positions this new venture as a potentially transformative streaming event.

Industry insiders suggest Taxe's screenplay emerged from an original spec that captured Hollywood's imagination with its distinctive narrative approach. While plot details remain closely guarded, sources indicate the project will explore uncharted narrative territory in the sci-fi genre.

21 Laps has rapidly established itself as a powerhouse production banner, consistently delivering projects that blend commercial appeal with creative ambition. Levy's strategic approach to developing speculative fiction has made him a sought-after creative partner for streaming platforms seeking distinctive, high-concept content.

The Netflix acquisition signals continued investment in original science fiction storytelling, a genre experiencing significant renaissance in the streaming era. With Levy's proven track record and Taxe's emerging talent, 'Somewhere Out There' represents another potential breakthrough in the evolving landscape of genre entertainment.
key_facts: Original spec script by Max Taxe
Follows Levy's successful genre track record
